'''Platoril''' was a barren [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]], the second planet from [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Po}}
